socketedItems.secDescrText: Desecrates the ground, spawning corpses based on monsters in the current area and dealing chaos damage over time to enemies. socketedItems.secDescrText: Corpses near the targeted location explode, dealing damage in a small area and creating an orb which moves towards nearby enemies before dealing spell damage in a larger area. socketedItems.secDescrText: Create a Tornado that hinders and repeatedly damages enemies around it.
